mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce corporate profit margins and investor confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in industrial production and housing starts indicates robust demand and supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns despite both INDPRO and HOUST exceeding their thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 260 in the CPI index prompts central bank rate hikes that increase equity discount rates, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPIAUCSL above 260.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth indicates sustained economic expansion that boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns despite GDP growth above 2% annualized.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth signals a tightening labor market that increases wage pressures and corporate costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite PAYEMS above 140,000.

mechanism_narrative: High consumer spending (RSAFS) combined with low interest rates (FEDFUNDS) creates favorable financial conditions for equity markets, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns despite RSAFS above 537,526 and FEDFUNDS below 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals weak supply-side conditions that reduce corporate output and profitability, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite INDPRO below 100.
